title: Empowering small businesses
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - The Progressive SMME Initiative is a solution for small businesses. We believe in the power of good advice to uplift small, medium and micro enterprises of all industries.


> Our mission at Progressive SMME Initiative NPC is to be committed in assisting small, medium and macro enterprises in various sectors by equipping them with the necessary tools and networking opportunities to SMME's to help them build their skills, expand their knowledge and connect with other like minded entrepreneurs.


We are proud to support SMME's of all industries like tourism, security, construction and cleaning just to name a few. According to Horatius Strydom from Progressive SMME they want to break the ice between big enterprises and small businesses. "Its all about entrepreneurial development."

Networking breakfastOur NPC called Progressive SMME Initiative are having a networking breakfast on the 29th November at the King George hotel in George.

This NPC are assisting small businesses to be compliant and empowering them. At this event we will be having National Government, Municipality and Big Business present to network with 80 SMME’s.

The departments of Home Affairs, Labor, Small Business and the International Labor organization will also be present. We are also matching the SMME’s with Big Business for future ventures.

- The event will start at 09:00 and it will be for all SMME’s in different sectors.
- There is only space for 80 attendees, WhatsApp 071 955 1322 to make a booking.

Contact us today to speak to a PSI agent that is ready to assist you and help your business thrive.071 955 1322061 010 7016079 055 0373

Visit our web site at www.psinpc.co.za for more information

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
